name: keke-vocab
description: 可可的单词魔法屋 - 英语单词学习网站

scripts.dev:portal: concurrently "cd apps/portal/server && node index.js" "cd apps/portal/client && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:poetry: concurrently "cd apps/poetry/server && node index.js" "cd apps/poetry/client && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run server" "npm run client" "cd apps/portal/client && npm run dev" "cd apps/poetry/client && npm run dev"
